channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 12 May: Harare overcast · high 26° / low 16°
item.description: Harare: high 26°, low 16° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 28°, low 14° (clear sky) · Mutare: high 28°, low 15° (overcast) · Gweru: high 27°, low 15° (clear sky) · Masvingo: high 28°, low 13° (clear sky) · Victoria Falls: high 31°, low 14° (clear sky) Tsumo yezuva: Zvikoni zvikoni mimba haibvi negosoro. (Some things have no simple solution.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
